title: Lanet: Ervah Cinleri
overview: The film is about four college students studying cinema who go on a trip to a completely abandoned village based on real events and rumors, and the terrifying things that happen to them during their research there. Everything that happens is recorded by the young people on a single camera. When the police team goes to the scene after the four young people are reported missing, they find this camera, which will reveal all the truth.
